tldr: You're shipping fresh creative consistently — 34 distinct concepts is well above the floor Andromeda needs to retrieve diversely — but the active set is suffocating itself with copy duplication. The 'Luxury Sterling Silver & Gemstones, Up to 45% Off' body block is running verbatim on roughly 60 of your 185 ads, which collapses them into a single retrieval cluster regardless of how varied the imagery is.

benchmark.context: At your scale, hero creative needs to refresh every ~10 days — typical jewelry brands run 21, top performers run 14, and high-volume accounts compress further because the algorithm exhausts winning angles faster. The good news: you're already shipping that fast. The drag is that ~60 of your live ads share the same body paragraph, so Andromeda is treating them as one ad.

ads.headline: Luxury Sterling Silver & Gemstones, Up to 45% Off
ads.body: Luxury You Deserve — Handcrafted in Bali. High-end design shouldn't be reserved for special occasions. Handcrafted by skilled artisans, each SARDA piece features genuine gemstones and .925 sterling silver.  Shop the collection and save up to 45%.
drivers: This exact body paragraph is running verbatim across roughly 60 of your live ads — Andromeda's clustering treats this as one creative no matter how different each image looks
13 days running puts this past your 10-day refresh window, and it's pointing to /collections/sarda-favorites alongside 40+ other ads competing for the same landing destination
The 'Luxury Sterling Silver & Gemstones, Up to 45% Off' headline is duplicated on at least 30 other live ads — there's no concept signal for the algorithm to differentiate

ads.headline: BOGO, Discount and Free Shipping! Use Code: STACK
ads.body: Buy One Get One Free and comes with a welcome kit on your first purchase.  ✦  Free Shipping ✦  Easy Returns Handcrafted in Bali Built on three generations.
drivers: The 'BOGO, Discount and Free Shipping' headline appears on roughly 30 of your live ads with two near-identical body variants — this is the textbook 'minor variations of one concept' anti-pattern Andromeda penalizes

13 days at your refresh cadence means the cluster is already past expiration; the same offer is also being told three different ways (STACK code version, plain BOGO version, full first-order paragraph) which dilutes the signal further
All BOGO ads point to the same /collections/all-of-sarda landing page — no destination diversity to help the algorithm split audiences

ads.headline: Luxury Sterling Silver & Gemstones, Up to 45% Off
ads.body: Luxury You Deserve — Handcrafted in Bali. High-end design shouldn't be reserved for special occasions. Handcrafted by skilled artisans, each SARDA piece features genuine gemstones and .925 sterling silver.  Shop the collection and save up to 45%.
drivers: Video format running the duplicate 'Luxury You Deserve' body that's on ~60 other ads — the format upgrade to video is wasted because the copy signal is identical
13 days in, this is past your refresh window and feeding the same retrieval cluster as the static versions — you're paying video CPMs for static-tier diversity
Landing on /collections/sarda-favorites which is already the destination of 40+ live ads; no audience or message routing happening

ads.headline: Designed for Your Daily Routine
ads.body: Tired of jewelry that loses its luster after a month?  Most "trendy" pieces are just plated shortcuts. At Sarda, we provide the solution: Jewelry made slowly, so it lasts longer.  - No plated shortcuts.  - No substitutions.  - Just sterling silver and natural gemstones built to endure.
drivers: This is your strongest copy angle — it actually has a hook, a villain (plated shortcuts), and a benefit — but it's been duplicated across roughly 12 ads in static, video, and image variants for 13 days running
All variants land on the homepage instead of a curated 'made-to-last' collection, which weakens the message-to-destination match
The 'Tired of...' opening edges close to Meta's personal-attribute framing — worth softening to a product-first construction before scaling

ads.headline: BOGO, Discount and Free Shipping!
ads.body: Buy One Get One Free and comes with a welcome kit on your first purchase.  ✦  Free Shipping ✦  Easy Returns Handcrafted in Bali Built on three generations.
drivers: Another video-format BOGO sharing exact body copy with 30+ live ads — Andromeda will surface the cheapest impression in the cluster, which is rarely your video
13 days running with no concept rotation; the BOGO offer itself is solid but the creative wrapper has been milked
Lands on /collections/all-of-sarda — the broadest possible destination, which is great for browsing but bad for ad-set conversion modeling

ads_compact.headline: Mothers Day Sale! Extra 40% Off!
ads_compact.body: Mothers Day is around the corner! Get luxury you deserve!  Handcrafted in Bali. High-end design shouldn't be reserved for special occasions...

ads_compact.headline: Counting Blessing's Ring IV™ in Peridot
ads_compact.body: Your SARDA collection is never truly finished. ✨ Janyl's newest Balinese-inspired designs are here, and they're even more breathtaking in person.

ads_compact.headline: {{product.name}}
ads_compact.body: Save 45% off all our New Arrivals - Discover the SARDA Difference and Join over 5,000 Happy Customers

hero_concept.hook: Three generations of silversmiths. One ocean-blue stone.
hero_concept.headline: Made slowly. Worn forever.
hero_concept.primary_text:
Chrysocolla doesn't sit still in the light. The blue-green veining shifts with the angle of your wrist — which is why Janyl chose it as the centerpiece of the Ocean's of Grace bundle.

Handcrafted in Bali in .925 sterling silver, set the slow way: no plated shortcuts, no stone substitutions, no shortcuts the algorithm rewards but the wearer doesn't.

First order ships free with a welcome kit. 5,000+ five-star reviews on the pieces customers come back for.
hero_concept.visual_direction: Tight, editorial-style macro of the Chrysocolla stone in its sterling silver setting, shot on warm linen with a single hand entering the frame — the antithesis of your current flat catalog look.
hero_concept.fills_gap: Across all 185 of your live ads, the storytelling lever is almost entirely unused — you have one founder-credibility ad running and zero close-up stone storytelling. Every other concept either pushes the BOGO or repeats the 'Luxury You Deserve' paragraph, so a stone-led, craft-led hero gives Andromeda a genuinely distinct cluster to surface against the offer-heavy mass.
hero_concept.image_prompt: A photorealistic editorial product photograph featuring the product from the reference image, styled in a tight macro composition resting on warm natural linen with a softly blurred Balinese woven texture in the background, with directional warm window light from camera-left casting gentle shadows that emphasize the dimensional veining of the chrysocolla stone and the hand-tooled detail of the sterling silver setting. The aesthetic is quiet luxury, slow-craft editorial, with a calm and grounded mood that contrasts sharply with bright catalog photography. Square 1:1 composition with breathing room top and bottom for ad text overlay. CRITICAL — preserve the .925 sterling silver finish exactly as shown in the reference, with its cool silver-white tone and hand-polished sheen, AND preserve the chrysocolla stone's exact ocean blue-to-teal-green color palette with its natural copper-brown matrix veining at the same intensity and pattern shown — strictly NO gold, brass, yellow, copper, or warm metallic tones on the metal, NO turquoise-only or solid blue recoloring of the stone, NO smoothing out of the natural veining, NO color temperature shift toward warm. STRUCTURE — preserve the exact construction of the Ocean's of Grace bundle as shown: same number of pieces in the bundle, same chrysocolla stone shapes and cuts, same bezel or prong setting style around each stone, same chain link patterns, same clasp types, same any visible filigree or granulation detail on the silver work. Do NOT add or remove stones, do NOT change setting style from bezel to prong or vice versa, do NOT swap the chain pattern, do NOT add additional chains or charms, do NOT alter the bundle composition. Render the product's metal, color, finish, fabric, weave, stones, surface treatment, AND every visible construction detail (silhouette, closures, hardware count, pockets, sleeves, neckline, printed graphics) EXACTLY as they appear in the reference image. Do NOT change the metal type, do NOT shift the color temperature, do NOT introduce tones not present in the reference, do NOT add or remove buttons, snaps, zippers, pockets, straps, or any hardware, do NOT alter the silhouette, do NOT remove or modify printed graphics or text on the garment. IMPORTANT: the 'no text' and 'no logos' items in the NEGATIVE list below apply ONLY to text or logos added as overlay to the photograph itself — text, logos, graphics, prints, and brand labels that exist ON the product in the reference image are part of the product and must be preserved exactly. Premium commerce photography quality. NEGATIVE: no overlay text added to the photograph, no overlay logos added to the photograph, no watermarks, no UI elements, no Facebook interface, no clickable buttons, no faces, no models, no collage, no borders, no duplicate products, no color shift, no metal swap, no silver-to-gold or gold-to-silver conversion, no warm-tone bias on cool metals, no recoloring of fabric or stones, no pattern modifications, no removing or replacing the product's printed graphics, no extra hardware not present in reference, no added pockets or pleats, no silhouette alterations, no design modifications.
hero_concept.reference_title: Ocean's of Grace In Chrysocolla Bundle

next_step.urgency: Six of your top-spending creatives hit fatigue between May 8–10.
next_step.headline: Walk through the cluster collapse together
next_step.body: I'd like to map the duplicate-body issue against your full active set on a 30-minute call and show you which 4 angles I'd build into the next two weeks. We'll leave with a concrete refresh plan, not a generic deck.

method_note: Mapped from your live Meta Ad Library footprint on May 3, 2026 — public creative signals only, no account-side metrics referenced.
